scripts.start: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.frontend: npx wait-on -t 60000 http-get://127.0.0.1:8000/health && cd frontend && npm run dev
scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt
